title: The Kjerag Deal
overview: Running from debts? Pfft, as if! This is me DROWNING in sponsorship deals, thank you very much, dear clients! Now, would you look at that mountain! So... snowy!

title: What the Fright, Siracusa?
overview: Wait, THIS is Siracusa?! So SCARY~ Quick, smash that like button to give your favorite host U some courage! WAAAAAAAH! ...Actually, you know what? Just hit the SKIP button for me, pretty please!

title: The Rap of Columbia
overview: Your girl U just teleported into Columbia and guess what? Turns out, I'm a natural at, like, everything here. Your U-Official, is here to electrify ALL of Terra!

title: U's Guide to Getting Fed: NYE Edition
overview:
Uh oh! It's New Year's Eve and U's wallet is EMPTY... But GOOD NEWS! Shangshu folks are SO nice!

So, prepare to be amazed by U's ingenious Free Grub Challenge!

title: Jungle Jams & Metal Mayhem!
overview: Join your favorite intrepid host, U, as I fearlessly pull back the mysterious veil of Acahualla! Buuuut... who IS this "Gavial" anyway?

title: Terra Economics
overview: Ever since taking that Terra Investment Masterclass, your girl U is a WHOLE NEW PERSON—and I'm feeling better than ever! This time, I'm gonna win back EVERYTHING I lost before! From Sargon all the way back to "that place"—I'm gonna make it BIG!

title: Sami Expedition: Real and Raw
overview: You know what they say—after every storm comes the sunshine! Your fearless Streamer U has made it to Sami! This untouched wilderness is gonna give me the EXCLUSIVE content—I'm streaming with EVERYTHING!
